overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist riding a mechanical mount through a snowy mountain landscape. The character traverses a narrow ridge trail, pauses at a scenic overlook to survey the vast valley, then descends through a dense snow-covered pine forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain ridge trail with cliff drop

agents.ego_description: riding the mechanical mount along the narrow snowy ridge trail, hugging the cliffside

entered.detail: narrow winding path covered in deep snow along the mountain ridge
steep rock wall rising on the right side of the trail
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far distance across the valley
tall evergreen trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous riding along a narrow snow-covered mountain ridge. The trail hugs a steep cliff face on the right with a dramatic drop visible on the left. Sparse pine trees line the path while distant snow-capped mountains fill the horizon under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: rider stops the mechanical mount at the cliff edge to view the landscape
camera pans to reveal expansive valley view with clouds below the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: stopped at the scenic overlook, surveying the vast mountain valley and cloud layer below

entered.detail: expansive vista of the valley below filled with mist and clouds
dense white clouds settled in the valley beneath the mountain peak

segments.scene_description: The rider stops at a scenic overlook, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the valley below filled with clouds. The camera pans across the vista as the character surveys the landscape, with the cliff face now behind and distant peaks visible in all directions.

events.description: rider resumes moving, descending from the overlook into the forested area
trail becomes more enclosed by dense snow-laden trees creating a tunnel-like effect

agents.ego_description: riding downhill through the dense snowy forest, navigating between closely spaced pine trees

entered.detail: large snow-covered boulder formation emerging from the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character resumes riding, descending from the overlook into a dense snow-covered pine forest. The trail winds through closely spaced trees laden with snow, with the open valley now obscured by the forest canopy. The lighting becomes more diffused as the trees close in around the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a high mountain ridge that transitions from an exposed cliffside vista into a secluded, snow-laden forest. It begins with a ride along a narrow, snow-covered trail hugging a steep cliff face, with distant peaks stretching across a clear horizon. As the rider reaches a scenic overlook, the camera pans away from the path to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of a cloud-filled valley. The scene then shifts as the character resumes their descent, moving away from the open heights and winding down into a dense pine forest. Finally, the expansive vista is obscured by a thick canopy of snow-covered trees, causing the bright mountain light to become soft and diffused.
